heading: Step 7: Drop the stream processor.
body:
**Atlas UI:**

Atlas UI

In the list of stream processors for your stream processing workspace, click the
**Delete** (trash-alt) icon for your stream
processor.

In the confirmation dialog that appears, type the name of the
stream processor (`solarDemo`) to confirm that you want to
delete it, and then click **Delete**.

**mongosh:**

Use the [sp.processor.drop()](manual/reference/method/sp.processor.drop) method in [mongosh](mongodb-shell) to
drop `solarDemo`:

```sh
sp.solarDemo.drop()
```

To confirm that you have dropped `solarDemo`, use the
[sp.listStreamProcessors()](manual/reference/method/sp.listStreamProcessors) method to list all your
available stream processors:

```sh
sp.listStreamProcessors()
```
